opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I take a breath, it feels like a knife in my ribs, and my heart is hammering out of my chest.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden sharp chest pain worse with breathing, racing heart, and a swollen painful calf.

symptom_narrative.character: sharp, stabbing chest pain, much worse with deep breaths or coughing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: like a knife in my ribs
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling of air hunger, racing heart, right calf pain and swelling over the last 2 days, one brief episode of feeling faint walking to the bathroom
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: recently returned from a 14-hour international flight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: sitting upright, clutching the chest, taking rapid shallow breaths

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse present and concerned, recent long-haul flight, unpacked suitcases still in the hallway

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened by the chest pain and racing heart

access_barriers.transport: spouse present but patient should not be moved/exerted given suspected clot risk
